form:Form.name: NucleusRH.BaytonRH.Legales.Rendiciones.RENDICION.MAIN.STD_REG.form

qry:select.name: qry_getADel
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT SUJ.c_sujeto, SUJ.d_sujeto, SUC.c_ubicacion, SUC.d_ubicacion, ADE.n_monto_adel, ADE.n_monto_a_rendir
FROM LEG04_ADELANTOS AS ADE, LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ AS CS, LEG40_SUJETOS AS SUJ, ORG03_UBICACIONES as SUC
JOIN ADE.oi_clasif_sujeto INNER CS.oi_clasif_sujeto, CS.oi_sujeto INNER SUJ.oi_sujeto, ADE.oi_ubicacion INNER SUC.oi_ubicacion
WHERE ADE.oi_adelanto = {$PARAM/@oi_adelanto}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: GetDatosCarpeta
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT SUJ.c_sujeto, SUJ.d_sujeto
FROM LEG04_ADELANTOS AS ADE, LEG01_CARPETAS as CAR, LEG40_SUJETOS AS SUJ
JOIN ADE.oi_carpeta INNER CAR.oi_carpeta, CAR.oi_sujeto INNER SUJ.oi_sujeto
WHERE ADE.oi_adelanto = {$PARAM/@oi_adelanto}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_get_data
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT SUJ.c_sujeto, SUJ.d_sujeto, SUC.c_ubicacion, SUC.d_ubicacion, ADE.oi_carpeta, CAR.oi_empresa
FROM LEG06_RENDICIONES AS REN, LEG04_ADELANTOS AS ADE, LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ AS CS, LEG40_SUJETOS AS SUJ, ORG03_UBICACIONES as SUC, LEG01_CARPETAS as CAR
JOIN REN.oi_adelanto INNER ADE.oi_adelanto, ADE.oi_clasif_sujeto INNER CS.oi_clasif_sujeto, CS.oi_sujeto INNER SUJ.oi_sujeto INNER, ADE.oi_ubicacion INNER SUC.oi_ubicacion, ADE.oi_carpeta INNER CAR.oi_carpeta
WHERE REN.oi_rendicion = {$PARAM/@oi_rendicion}
')/ROWS/ROW
